## Severity

<!-- How does this bug impact the project? -->

- [ ] **Critical**: Application crashes, data loss, security vulnerability
- [ ] **High**: Major functionality broken, workarounds difficult
- [ ] **Medium**: Minor functionality broken, workaround exists
- [ ] **Low**: Cosmetic issues, minimal impact
